heading: Period of limitations on making adjustments
label: 6235 Period of limitations on making adjustments

children.label: A
children.text: the date on which the partnership return for such taxable year was filed,

children.label: B
children.text: the return due date for the taxable year, or

children.label: C
children.text: the date on which the partnership filed an administrative adjustment request with respect to such year under section 6227, or

in the case of any modification of an imputed underpayment under section 6225(c), the date that is 270 days (plus the number of days of any extension consented to by the Secretary under paragraph (7) thereof) after the date on which everything required to be submitted to the Secretary pursuant to such section is so submitted, or

in the case of any notice of a proposed partnership adjustment under section 6231(a)(2), the date that is 330 days (plus the number of days of any extension consented to by the Secretary under section 6225(c)(7)) after the date of such notice.

children.heading: Extension by agreement
children.label: b Extension by agreement
children.text: The period described in subsection (a) (including an extension period under this subsection) may be extended by an agreement entered into by the Secretary and the partnership before the expiration of such period.

children.heading: Special rule in case of fraud, etc.
children.label: c Special rule in case of fraud, etc.

children.heading: False return
children.label: 1 False return
children.text: In the case of a false or fraudulent partnership return with intent to evade tax, the adjustment may be made at any time.

children.heading: Substantial omission of income
children.label: 2 Substantial omission of income
children.text: If any partnership omits from gross income an amount properly includible therein and such amount is described in subparagraph (A) or (C) of section 6501(e)(1), subsection (a) shall be applied by substituting “6 years” for “3 years”.

children.heading: No return
children.label: 3 No return
children.text: In the case of a failure by a partnership to file a return for any taxable year, the adjustment may be made at any time.

children.heading: Return filed by Secretary
children.label: 4 Return filed by Secretary
children.text: For purposes of this section, a return executed by the Secretary under subsection (b) of section 6020 on behalf of the partnership shall not be treated as a return of the partnership.

children.heading: Information required to be reported
children.label: 5 Information required to be reported
children.text: In the case of a partnership that is required to report any information described in section 6501(c)(8), the time for making any adjustment under this subchapter with respect to any tax return, event, or period to which such information relates shall not expire before the date that is determined under section 6501(c)(8).

children.heading: Listed transactions
children.label: 6 Listed transactions
children.text: If a partnership fails to include on any return or statement any information with respect to a listed transaction as described in section 6501(c)(10), the time for making any adjustment under this subchapter with respect to such transaction shall not expire before the date that is determined under section 6501(c)(10).
